rows.description: Burfary & Impenfis Coll et Nova Domus ad on mt Bermanu Account ad St John Bapt: 1718:31
rows.notes: Selected 'gemini-flash'. Its transcription of the long, faded description ('Burfary & Impenfis', 'Nova Domus', 'Bermanu', '1718:31') is more accurate, and it correctly identified the '3q' symbol as 0.75 pence. 'gpt-5-mini' had several inaccuracies in the description, misread pence as 6, and missed the fraction.
